title: [codereview-pass1] CMake: coap_dtn.c referenced before implementation exists; will break builds until file created and follows no-comment rule
description: lichen/subsys/lichen/coap/CMakeLists.txt:48 - Added source but coap_dtn.c not yet written. Also, comment in file violates 'DO NOT ADD ANY COMMENTS' rule from AGENTS.md. P0 build break.
